review.headline: Adds per-persona RPCs with copy-on-write for SOP suites, modifying 8 public symbols and 3 caller files.

cites.excerpt: title: feat[talk] add per-persona RPCs with copy-on-write for SOP suites
Adds per-persona RPCs with copy-on-write for SOP suites, modifying 8 public symbols and 3 caller files.

plan.overview: This PR introduces new per-persona RPCs to the `talk` service, enabling operations like creating, updating, and deleting personas. It involves significant changes to the core Python `TalkService` and its associated test controller. The changes also include updates to generated Go protobuf and gRPC files to expose these new functionalities.

steps.title: Modify TalkService Class
steps.what: This step modifies the `TalkService` class, which is the core Python RPC service for talk-related functionalities. The changes span a significant portion of the class, from line 25 to 217.
steps.why: This is a feature PR aiming to add per-persona RPCs. Modifying the main service class is a foundational step to introduce new RPC methods and their underlying logic.
steps.impact: This class is called by `python/rpc/rpc/main.py`, indicating it's a central component of the RPC server. The changes affect 2 modules and 3 caller files.

steps.title: Add DeletePersona RPC Method
steps.what: A new method, `DeletePersona`, is added to the `TalkService` class. This method is responsible for handling the deletion of a persona.
steps.why: This change directly implements one of the "per-persona RPCs" mentioned in the PR title. It provides functionality to remove persona data.
steps.impact: This new method is exposed via the `TalkServiceStub`, meaning it's a public API. This contributes to the 8 public symbols modified by this PR.

steps.title: Modify TalkTestSuiteController
steps.what: The `TalkTestSuiteController` class has been significantly modified, spanning almost its entire definition. This class likely manages test suites related to talk functionalities.
steps.why: Author did not state intent for this region. However, given the `pr_type: feat` and the addition of new RPCs, these changes likely involve integrating the new persona RPCs into existing test suites or adding new test cases.

steps.title: Update Go Protobuf Definitions (service.pb.go)
steps.what: This step involves a specific hunk of changes within the generated Go protobuf file for the `talk` service. This file defines the data structures for RPC messages.
steps.why: As a feature PR adding new RPCs, changes to the protobuf definitions are necessary to define the request and response messages for the new `DeletePersona` and `UpsertPersona` RPCs.
steps.impact: This is a generated file, so direct callers are not listed, but it impacts any Go service consuming the `talk` RPCs. The `sql_in_changed_lines` signal suggests new fields might relate to database IDs or queries.

steps.title: Update Go gRPC Service Definitions (service_grpc.pb.go)

steps.why: To expose the new `DeletePersona` and `UpsertPersona` RPCs, the gRPC service definition must be updated in the generated code.
steps.impact: This is a generated file, but it directly impacts how Go clients and servers interact with the `talk` service. The `sql_in_changed_lines` signal is present.
